extract: Goodra (Japanese: ヌメルゴン Numelgon) is a Dragon-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves from Sliggoo starting at level 50 when leveled up during rain in the overworld. It is the final form of Goomy. In Hisui, Goodra has a dual-type Steel/Dragon regional form. It evolves from Hisuian Sliggoo starting at level 50 during rain in the overworld. It is the final form of Goomy in the Hisui region. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.) It is referred to as a pseudo-legendary Pokémon by fans.
